Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Against Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Kathleen Bernard, plaintiff in Propria Persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Kathleen Bernard's motion for a protective order is Granted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to issuing a subpoena that limits the request for records to conditions related to the claimed injuries and for a reasonable period of time before the accident. The parties are also ordered to meet and confer as to drafting a stipulated protected order that limits the use or dissemination of any personal medical records to matters related to the instant litigation. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Case Questionaire
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Kathleen Bernard, plaintiff in Propria Persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Kathleen Bernard's motion to compel responses to case questionnaire is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
